purpose: Source-bound component contract for the full ground floor openings. It carries arched windows, visual subdivisions/kleinhouten, flyscreens, screens, Invisivent and erker leaves forward as separate editable component slots.

objects.label: boograam achtergevel / panoramisch raam

component_families.next_mesh_gate: bind arch curve to wall cut and visible frame before final mesh
separate true frame/mullion from decorative/context linework
bind decorative bars to exact glass panels
bind material/style to exact frame objects

rules: Use exact CAD source entities and source text only.
Do not generate final frame/glass/flyscreen/screen mesh from boxes or manual markup.
Boogvormen, erker-leaves, kleinhouten, Invisivent, screens and vliegenramen must stay as separate component slots.
Context notes such as plinth, rainwater pipe, gutter and facade material do not become opening geometry.

objects.label: erker inclusief raamdeur

component_families.next_mesh_gate: separate true frame/mullion from decorative/context linework

rules: Use exact CAD source entities and source text only.
Do not generate final frame/glass/flyscreen/screen mesh from boxes or manual markup.
Boogvormen, erker-leaves, kleinhouten, Invisivent, screens and vliegenramen must stay as separate component slots.
Context notes such as plinth, rainwater pipe, gutter and facade material do not become opening geometry.
This contract preserves exact CAD/detail evidence; it is not final geometry.
Opening components remain separate from wall mass, plinth, rainwater pipe, gutter and general facade material context.
Final photorealistic mesh requires the cut preview to be validated and component subparts to be promoted one family at a time.
next_required_steps: Generate a component QA view per opening using this contract.
After user location validation, bind frame/glass/flyscreen/screen/ventilation subparts to final wall cuts.
Only then create real glass, frame, flyscreen and screen meshes for WebGL/Blender/Twinmotion/Unreal.
